programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2
programme.desc: Andy and Rodney challenge Kyle and Salty Mike to a treehouse building competition. Things get out of hand. Need I say more?

programme.title: Top Chef Junior S2
programme.desc: Most of the chefs are very familiar with the main ingredient for this Quickfire Challenge: instant ramen! But Host Vanessa Lachey and Guest Judge Sheldon Simeon aren’t looking for the 5-minute version. Instead, the chefs have access to all the ingredients in the Top Chef Junior pantry to put their own spin on this popular dish. For their Elimination Challenge, the chefs are woken up by a surprise knock at their door and discover it's time to get cracking on a scrumptious brunch dish they’ll cook in their own rooms and serve to the judges on a roof top terrace!

programme.title: Ruby And The Well S1
programme.desc: The Emerald Apple Festival is back and so is a mysterious wish from the town’s festive past. Daniel and Paula revive the traditional apple cart race.

programme.title: Generator Rex S1
programme.desc: Providence encounters a street gang of teenage evos and are shocked to discover that Rex was once a member!

programme.title: Generator Rex S1
programme.desc: The evil computer ZAG RS returns to take control of all nanites in this nail-biting outer space adventure!

programme.title: Top Chef S17
programme.desc: This week the chefs honor the late, great Pulitzer-Prize winning food critic Jonathan Gold. Using Gold’s last guide list, the chefs fan out all over Los Angeles to sample the unique taquerias, food trucks, mom-and-pop cafes, upscale eateries and ethnic cuisine only found in the City of Angels. Drawing inspiration from this one-in-a-lifetime culinary odyssey, the chefs create dishes to serve 200 of Jonathan Gold’s friends, family, and restaurateurs that he loved at the iconic Union Station. Noted food writer and personal friend of Jonathan Gold, Ruth Reichl serves as guest judge alongside Padma, Tom and Gail.

programme.title: Happily Ever After: Fairy Tales For Every Child S1
programme.desc: Ricardo Montalban and Lucie Arnaz are the King and Queen in this Latino version of the fairy tale. Paul Rodriguez is the Jester.

programme.title: Happily Ever After: Fairy Tales For Every Child S1
programme.desc: Whoopi Goldberg really lets her hair down as Zenobia, the Hoodoo Diva, who keeps Rapunzel locked in a high tower in the bayou.

programme.title: Must Love Dogs
programme.desc: A lady sets out to change her single status by putting up a personal ad but realises she has too much to handle when men respond to the ad.

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S2
programme.desc: Skip and Chip have a big fight, and it's up to Lazlo to get them back together again.

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S2
programme.desc: All the campers vie to become Camp Kidney's newest mascot; unfortunately, there can be only one winner.

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S2
programme.desc: Edward 'earns' enough badges to become the first camper ever to graduate from Camp Kidney--but does he want to go?

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S2
programme.desc: Edward gets bit by a wood gnome, and he discovers that this is no little mosquito bite!

programme.desc: Raj and Smason fight over a secret hotsprings only to end up shriveled raisins from soaking in it too long.

programme.desc: When Rodney kills Mr. J's prized flowers the night before a big flower show, he and Andy make outlandish promises to the plants so they'll stay healthy. Things get stranger when the plants begin making outlandish demands!

programme.desc: Mr. J is disgusted with the daily newspaper.

programme.desc: The stakes are very high as Ruby wrestles with how to solve a wish that hits close to home. Daniel’s in-laws come for a visit, reopening old wounds.

programme.title: Generator Rex S1

programme.title: Generator Rex S1
programme.desc: Tiny, metal-munching evo wasps are destroying everything, and Rex and co must stop them.

programme.title: Top Chef S17
programme.desc: Comedic superstars Ali Wong and Randall Park swing by the Top Chef kitchen for a Quickfire Challenge tasking the chefs to make the wackiest fried rice they can. Then, the chefs head to the famed Getty Museum to seek inspiration from one of four historical art movements to create a masterpiece on their plate. Guest Judge Ludo Lefebvre joins Tom, Padma and Gail, as well as guest diners Chefs Ray Garcia, Sara Hymanson, Sarah Kramer and Craig Thornton.

programme.title: Pan
programme.desc: An orphan is spirited away to a magical land, where he finds both fun and dangers, and discovers his destiny — to become the hero who will be known as Peter Pan.

Mosquito flits off to spread the news - ‘The sun is never going to rise again!' – soon the whole of Tinga Tinga is in complete panic – ‘The Sun is never going to rise again!' Of course, the sun does rise again and all is right again in Tinga Tinga. But the animals decide to tie a grass around Mosquito's tail. From that day on Mosquito buzzes and everyone can swot her away rather than listen to her gossipy tales. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Invisible Evidence

programme.title: Final Justice
programme.desc: A cop relies on a young car thief to take down four gangsters who plan to rob a rich merchant

programme.title: Revenger
programme.desc: After waking up and discovering that he has undergone gender reassignment surgery, an assassin seeks to find the doctor responsible.

programme.title: In Our Prime
programme.desc: Follows Ji-woo, an outcast in a prestigious private high school who meets Hak-sung, the school's security guard, and asks him to teach him math and become friends, but their friendship \ is at risk after an incident in school.

programme.title: Urban Myths
programme.desc: Seoulgoedam (literally meaning “Seoul Ghost Stories”), is a horror anthology film that focuses on Korean folklore that has been passed down from generation to generation.

programme.title: Tiger Cage 2
programme.desc: Gangsters pursue a Hong Kong lawman framed for murder and a lawyer they believe is linked to laundered money.

programme.title: Eliminators
programme.desc: A former US Federal Agent must abandon the witness protection program and come out of hiding when his London home is invaded in error due to a wrong address.

programme.title: The Hollow Point

programme.title: Legendary Amazons

programme.title: The Wailing
programme.desc: Suspicion leads to hysteria when rural villagers link a series of brutal murders to the arrival of a mysterious stranger

programme.title: The Way Of The Dragon

programme.title: Loch Lomond: A Year In The Wild
programme.desc: The winter is mild and wet, which is good news for some but bad news for others. Red deer are forced to higher ground, salmon have gone six months without food, mountain hares turn a conspicuous white, and squirrels kick their own young out of the nest.

programme.title: Wildest Survival S2
programme.desc: Extraordinarily large animals need extraordinary adaptations. From mighty whales to forest monsters, these are the epic survival stories of nature’s giants.

programme.title: Wildest Survival S2
programme.desc: Living your life at night can present extreme challenges - and massive opportunities. In this world without light, danger lurks around every corner.

programme.title: Wildest Survival S2

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam Liaw continues his culinary tour of Japan, preparing fresh sushi and taking a trip to his wife's hometown to indulge in a little home cooking.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Hare didn't hop. He was one of the speediest animals in Tinga Tinga but none of the other animals wanted to race with him because Hare always won and it was becoming boring. Then one day, slow but clever Tortoise decides to challenge Hare. Hare can't believe his luck, but Tortoise wins and he wins and he wins! When Hare realizes that it's not such fun being on the losing end, Tortoise finally lets Hare hop past the finishing line in first place! Well it's not good to win all the time. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: You see there was time when Mosquito didn't buzz. Mosquito was as quiet as quiet can be… and did she like to tell tales. One day Mosquito tells the Monkeys that the sun looks very low in the sky. ‘Maybe it's sad and doesn't want to rise!' worry the Monkeys. Mosquito flits off to spread the news - ‘The sun is never going to rise again!' – soon the whole of Tinga Tinga is in complete panic – ‘The Sun is never going to rise again!' Of course, the sun does rise again and all is right again in Tinga Tinga. But the animals decide to tie a grass around Mosquito's tail. From that day on Mosquito buzzes and everyone can swot her away rather than listen to her gossipy tales. Tales from Africa.

programme.desc: In Adelaide's Henley Beach, Paul and Marie transform an electricity converter station into a high-end entertainer's home, while on the Gold Coast, Chris and Antoinette reimagine a run-down house into a coastal retreat.

programme.title: Dream Gardens - Mount Eliza, VIC
programme.desc: Artist Meredith Gaston and her husband Kevin Lindemann want a modern landscape to surround their house in Victoria's Mount Eliza. Instead, they have a neglected 40-year-old garden full of weeds and disease riddled trees.

programme.desc: From the kangaroo to the quokka, city to the country, Australia's fascinating marsupials with their pouches are integral to Aussie culture.

programme.title: Girls Can't Surf
programme.desc: The untold story of how a band of renegade surfer girls in the 1980s fought to create their own professional sport, changing surf culture forever.

programme.title: From Here To Eternity
programme.desc: A brooding loner finds love and turmoil on the eve of the bombing of Pearl Harbor's bombings.

programme.title: Epic Movie
programme.desc: Two of the warped writers of Scary Movie now set their parodic sights on the largest genre of them all: Hollywood's big-budget, special effects-laden, blockbuster franchise films.

programme.title: Flash Gordon
programme.desc: A football player and his friends travel to the planet Mongo and find themselves fighting the tyranny of Ming the Merciless to save Earth.

programme.title: Under Fire
programme.desc: Three journalists in a romantic triangle are involved in political intrigue during the last days of the corrupt Somoza regime in Nicaragua before it falls to a popular revolution in 1979.

programme.title: Legally Blonde
programme.desc: When Elle, a sorority queen, is dumped by her boyfriend as he plans to go to law school, she enrols in the same school to win him back. However, she discovers that there is more to her than her looks.

programme.title: From Here To Eternity
programme.desc: A brooding loner finds love and turmoil on the eve of the bombing of Pearl Harbor's bombings.

programme.title: Liar, Liar
programme.desc: Jim Carrey stars as a fast-talking attorney and habitual liar who, forced by his son's birthday wish, must tell the truth for the next 24 hours.

programme.title: On The Waterfront
programme.desc: A brutally realistic tour de force chronicling the conflict between a corrupt labor boss and a crusading Catholic priest.

programme.title: Mamma Mia!
programme.desc: Have the time of your life with Meryl Streep and an all-star cast in this undeniably fun celebration of mothers and daughters, old friends and newly found family!

programme.title: Epic Movie
programme.desc: Two of the warped writers of Scary Movie now set their parodic sights on the largest genre of them all: Hollywood's big-budget, special effects-laden, blockbuster franchise films.

programme.title: Knight and Day
programme.desc: When a fugitive couple's glamorous and sometimes deadly adventure erupts into a maze of double-crosses, close escapes, false identities, and head-spinning romantic snafus, they come to realize that all they can count on is each other.

programme.title: Liar, Liar
programme.desc: Jim Carrey stars as a fast-talking attorney and habitual liar who, forced by his son's birthday wish, must tell the truth for the next 24 hours.

programme.title: Daredevil
programme.desc: A lawyer blinded by radioactive waste fights crime as an acrobatic martial arts superhero, using his other senses, which have been enhanced.

programme.title: Malaysian Drug Mules
programme.desc: Follow the Royal Malaysian Police as they go in pursuit of sinister Nigerian gangs who deceive or coerce hundreds of Malaysian women into smuggling drugs.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw (S2)
programme.desc: After an 80-year-old woman vanishes, local police and the FBI team up in the pursuit of a suspected serial killer.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw (S2)
programme.desc: At the scene of a chilling triple murder in Northern Maine, detectives recover DNA evidence that suggests an out-of-town visitor may be behind the brutal crime.

programme.title: City Confidential (S9)
programme.desc: When an accomplished young musician and local stage actress is found lifeless in her own bed, no one in Hartford, Wisconsin, can figure out what happened.

programme.title: Evil Up Close (S6)
programme.desc: 10-year-old Karen Pedley was hailed a hero when she saved her family from a fire. That event triggered a lifelong obsession, one which would lead to her setting alight the nursing home where she worked.

programme.title: First Blood (S1)
programme.desc: Growing up gay in the hyper-masculine Bayou was tough on Ronald Dominique. An inability to connect and a prison sexual assault would cement his decision to ultimately kill his first victim.

programme.title: Hoarders (S15)
programme.desc: Terri blames hoarding on her busy schedule, but past trauma reveals the truth. After a fire raised safety concerns, she must clean up with the Hoarders team.

programme.title: Undercover: Caught On Tape
programme.desc: Undercover agents Lyle Kirian and Brian Townsend embed themselves in two different but equally dangerous worlds in order to investigate suspected local gang members and the Mexican cartel.

programme.title: I Survived A Crime (S2)
programme.desc: A young woman is brutally attacked on the train by an assailant; a coach witnesses a student with a gun roam the hall; a store clerk faces a suspect trying to rob him with an unusual weapon.

programme.title: I Survived A Crime (S2)
programme.desc: A simple snack at a local restaurant turns violent when a grandmother is ripped off, but does not give up. A woman takes on the man who slammed into her van and then tries to run.

programme.title: Cleansing Kalijodo
programme.desc: Kalijodo is a gang-controlled slum. When a gang leader's brother is killed, the slum erupts into violence and it is up to the new captain to restore order and break the gangs' hold on the district.

programme.title: Murder At The Motel
programme.desc: August 29, 2006, Riverside County, CA. Deputies from the Riverside County Sheriff's Department respond to the scene of an abandoned vehicle in a remote area of the Gavilan Hills.

programme.title: Interrogation Cam
programme.desc: Detectives interrogate a woman accused of killing a lottery winner for his $30,000,000 prize; special agents press an ex-con about a missing 5-year-old girl and her dead babysitter; and more.

programme.title: Interrogation Cam
programme.desc: A 92-year-old woman tells investigators why she shot and killed her 72-year-old son; a detective tells a suspect that the man he’s accused of stabbing has died at the hospital; and more.

programme.title: Court Cam (S5)
programme.desc: An accused burglar keeps falling asleep during his virtual hearing; a judge has no time for Sovereign Citizen tactics; a drunk school bus driver shows up impaired for his plea hearing; and more.

programme.title: Court Cam (S5)
programme.desc: A convicted felon shows the judge his gunshot wounds; a judge can't stop laughing at a defendant's inability to parallel park; a convicted killer must face a judge known as 'Scary Mary'; and more.

programme.title: After The First 48 (S15)
programme.desc: After a man is gunned down at an after-hours club, investigators and the prosecutor are left with no witnesses willing to provide testimony, leaving the case hanging on the defendant's self-defence claim.

programme.title: The First 48 (S26)
programme.desc: After an argument in his home, a man answers a knock at his front door and is suddenly shot and killed.

programme.title: Homicide Squad New Orleans (S2)
programme.desc: An online dispute turns into a physical fight that ends with a mother losing her life. As Det. Fyfe unravels names of possible suspects, he zeroes in on a gang that has been terrorising the city.

programme.title: After The First 48 (S14)
programme.desc: When a Tulsa father of two is shot just blocks from his ex-girlfriend's house, detectives have to decide which of two persons of interest should be charged with his murder.

programme.desc: After a construction company boss is found shot dead, no arrests are made. An employee says he'd been bound and gagged by a gang just before the shooting. But 14 years later police charge him with murder.

programme.title: Helen Dorn: Breathless
programme.desc: In an illegal arms case, three men, including two policemen, are dead. Mattheisen reveals a radical right-wing conspiracy, and suspects a mole. However, he is shot dead with Inspector Dorn’s weapon, while Dorn is found at the crime scene with no memory.

programme.title: Europa
programme.desc: Kamal has fled Iraq to try to enter "Fortress Europe". At the Turkish-Bulgarian border, local mercenaries are ruthlessly hunting down migrants. Alone in the forest, Kamal has three days to escape.

programme.title: I Have Electric Dreams
programme.desc: 16-year-old Eva is experiencing her sexual awakening and is desperate to leave the house she shares with her mother and younger sister and move in with her estranged father, a troubled artist who paints, sculpts, writes poetry and drinks too much.

programme.title: Complicity
programme.desc: Inspired by a real-life incident. Cheng Liang, a Chinese illegal immigrant in Japan finds new direction when he fakes his identity and lands an apprenticeship with a master soba chef. However, the threat of deportation always lurks around the corner.

programme.title: Tuesday Club
programme.desc: Karin's world crumbles on her 40th anniversary when she discovers her husband’s infidelity. Seeking solace in a cooking class with renowned chef Henrik, she rediscovers her lifelong passions and learns that it is never too late to follow her dreams.

programme.title: Life Feels Good
programme.desc: The true story of Mateusz, a man suffering from cerebral palsy, who in his early childhood had been diagnosed as a retard with no contact with the outside world. After twenty-five years it turned out that he was a perfectly normal and intelligent person.

programme.title: A Murder Of Crows The Detective And The Fear
programme.desc: When Inspector Martin Brühl awakens in the morning, he is alarmed by partner Susanne Koch’s absence. Unbeknownst to him, Susanne witnessed a crime on her nightly walk home. Critically injured in an ATM explosion, she was kidnapped by the perpetrators.

programme.title: Black Snow
programme.desc: Gosha is a trucker in northern Yakutia, who supplies his community with food, alongside low quality vodka which contributes to their alcoholism. When his truck breaks down during one of his trips, he finds himself alone in the wilderness.

programme.title: Rival
programme.desc: 9-year-old Roman follows his mother Oksana, an illegal nurse in Germany. Oksana falls in love with 62-year-old Gert who tries to befriend Roman. While spending an afternoon alone with Roman, Gert suddenly dies of a heart attack, leaving Roman alone.

programme.title: Hunters On A White Field
programme.desc: Deep in the Swedish woods, three friends go on an extended weekend hunting trip. After an initial spell of success, the animals suddenly vanish without a trace. Despite being in a forest without animals, the men decide that the hunt must continue.

programme.title: Helen Dorn: Breathless
programme.desc: In an illegal arms case, three men, including two policemen, are dead. Mattheisen reveals a radical right-wing conspiracy, and suspects a mole. However, he is shot dead with Inspector Dorn’s weapon, while Dorn is found at the crime scene with no memory.

programme.title: Until Tomorrow
programme.desc: A single mother's courage is tested when she resorts to desperate measures to hide her illegitimate child from her parents.

programme.title: The Traveller: The Temptation of Evil
programme.desc: Captain Kandinsky is called upon to investigate the death of a dentist whose body was found charred. Kandinsky doubts the official verdict of suicide when he discovers two other victims whose bodies were also found charred in the same region.

programme.title: Just Like A Woman
programme.desc: Two women travel from Chicago to Santa Fe to escape their suffocating lives. Marilyn dreams of winning a contest held by a famous belly dancing company, while her friend, Mona, has a darker secret.

programme.title: Confession

programme.title: Life Feels Good
programme.desc: The true story of Mateusz, a man suffering from cerebral palsy, who in his early childhood had been diagnosed as a retard with no contact with the outside world. After twenty-five years it turned out that he was a perfectly normal and intelligent person.

programme.title: Black Snow
programme.desc: Gosha is a trucker in northern Yakutia, who supplies his community with food, alongside low quality vodka which contributes to their alcoholism. When his truck breaks down during one of his trips, he finds himself alone in the wilderness.

programme.title: Hunters On A White Field
programme.desc: Deep in the Swedish woods, three friends go on an extended weekend hunting trip. After an initial spell of success, the animals suddenly vanish without a trace. Despite being in a forest without animals, the men decide that the hunt must continue.

programme.title: Until Tomorrow
programme.desc: A single mother's courage is tested when she resorts to desperate measures to hide her illegitimate child from her parents.

programme.title: Train Driver's Diary
programme.desc: As Ilija nears retirement, his record of unintentional deaths as a train driver weighs heavy. His adopted son, Sima, fears following in his footsteps. But as days pass without incident, Ilija's determination to ensure Sima's success takes a dark turn.

programme.title: The Traveller: The Temptation of Evil
programme.desc: Captain Kandinsky is called upon to investigate the death of a dentist whose body was found charred. Kandinsky doubts the official verdict of suicide when he discovers two other victims whose bodies were also found charred in the same region.

programme.title: A Dose Of Happiness
programme.desc: Vesala’s search for happiness led her into an early marriage and a 3-year-old daughter. After her marriage fails, she and her daughter are brought down a path that leads to hell and back, one which brings her through drugs, fall, fear and redemption.

programme.title: Just Like A Woman
programme.desc: Two women travel from Chicago to Santa Fe to escape their suffocating lives. Marilyn dreams of winning a contest held by a famous belly dancing company, while her friend, Mona, has a darker secret.

programme.title: A Thousand Times Good Night
programme.desc: Rebecca is one of the world's top war photographers. She must weather a major emotional storm when her husband and young daughters refuse to put up with her dangerous life any longer. They need Rebecca, who, however, loves both her family and her work.

programme.title: Confession
programme.desc: Laras was pressured to express his decision to live without children when his in-laws asked him to adopt a child because he was deemed unable to produce offspring.

programme.title: Helen Dorn: A Little Bit Of Freedom
programme.desc: Haunted by a missing boy's case from 14 years ago, Helen Dorn recently discovers a lead linking to the alleged perpetrator, Ron Faber. Dorn immediately heads for Hamburg when she learns that Faber was apprehended with a deceased Chinese boy in his van.

programme.title: The Black Minutes
programme.desc: Vicente Rangel, a musician turned detective, embarks on a police case to catch a murderer of girls in a corrupt oil town on the Gulf of Mexico.

programme.title: Tokyo Fianc ée
programme.desc: A charming and tender tale of young love and cultural discovery. Amélie, a Japanophile young Belgian woman in Tokyo falls into a whirlwind romance with Rinri, a Francophile Japanese student.

programme.title: Like Crazy
programme.desc: Two mental patients, a motor-mouthed fantasist and a tattooed introvert, who met at a community hospital, fled the hospital to embark on a road trip from Tuscany to Rome, in search of love and happiness in the open-air nuthouse - the world of sane people.

programme.title: Helen Dorn: The Seeds Of Violence
programme.desc: At the Hamburg DOM festival, Helen Dorn and forensic scientist Weyer witness a paramedic's brutal assault. When a high-society boy is later found dead, unravelling a dark secret linking the two cases.
